ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "prog_id" INTEGER /* Program identifier associated with the experiment */,
  "lit_id" INTEGER /* Literature reference related to the experiment */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Interval of measurement for the experiment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Metric value recorded during the experiment */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for the experiment (in minutes) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass associated with the experiment (in grams) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_prog_id FOREIGN KEY ("prog_id") REFERENCES programs ("prog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lit_id FOREIGN KEY ("lit_id") REFERENCES literatures ("lit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "prog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "prog_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "prog_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., research, development) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literatures" (
  "lit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature reference */,
  "lit_reference" TEXT /* Reference text for the literature */,
  "lit_author" TEXT /* Author of the literature */,
  "lit_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the literature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the literature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_range" TEXT /* Description of the interval range */,
  "interval_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to this result */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value obtained from the analysis */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
